hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.py) python -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('$f', encoding='utf-8').read())" 2>&1 && echo '{"suppressOutput": true}' || echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Python syntax error in $f\"}" ;; *.ts|*.tsx) cd frontend 2>/dev/null && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -5 | { read -r line; [ -z "$line" ] && echo '{"suppressOutput": true}' || echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"TypeScript error: $line\"}"; } ;; *) echo '{"suppressOutput": true}' ;; esac; }
